phase: Phase P3A-RPC Production Mainnet RPC Readiness
summary: Server-side RPC strategy in place so P3A can read real mainnet LIFE++ balances + evaluate eligibility through a production-grade RPC without exposing a paid api-key to the browser. The paid RPC is a server-only Worker secret named SOLANA_RPC_URL (set via `wrangler secret put`, never committed to vars). Browser balance/eligibility reads route through the production server route /api/solana/lifepp-balance, which resolves the secret via getCloudflareContext().env and reads the chain server-side; the response never includes the RPC URL. In production, if the secret is missing the route fails soft with a clear readonly error (rpc_not_configured, 503) instead of silently using the public fallback. NEXT_PUBLIC_SOLANA_RPC_URL stays the public, keyless, rate-limited placeholder. No deploy, no deploy/root-production workflow dispatch, no root-domain change, no transfer/burn/signing/canary/transaction/treasury mutation.
p3aDeployAllowedNote: Deploy allowed only after the real SOLANA_RPC_URL secret is configured (and operator authorizes). In production the readonly balance route fails soft (rpc_not_configured) when the secret is absent, so the deploy is not usable without it.
secretSetCommand: npx wrangler secret put SOLANA_RPC_URL --config wrangler.workers.p3a.jsonc

ciVerification.note: workflowDispatched/rootProductionWorkflowDispatched above refer to deploy/root-production workflows (none dispatched). The CI runs below are gates-only verification of the pushed commit; the preview deploy job was skipped.

priorityOrder: process.env.SOLANA_RPC_URL (server-only secret; never NEXT_PUBLIC; undefined in browser)
rpcResolution.browserBehavior: readLifePlusBalanceRaw is environment-aware: when typeof window !== 'undefined' it fetches /api/solana/lifepp-balance instead of opening a client-side RPC Connection.
rpcResolution.serverBehavior: readLifePlusBalanceForOwner(owner, rpcUrlOverride?) reads the chain directly; the production route resolves the secret via getCloudflareContext().env and injects it.

serverRoute.failSoftOnMissingSecretInProduction: rpc_not_configured (HTTP 503) when NEXT_PUBLIC_AHIN_ENV=production and no server-side SOLANA_RPC_URL is configured
serverRoute.scope: reads only the LIFE++ associated-token-account balance for the supplied wallet.

structuralTransferPrevention.transferEnabled: isLive && protocolArmed && transferArmed => always false in live-readonly

filesChanged: src/lib/lifePlusSolana.ts (resolveRpcUrl prefers SOLANA_RPC_URL; getConnection rpcUrlOverride; environment-aware readLifePlusBalanceRaw; readLifePlusBalanceForOwner + readLifePlusBalanceViaServer + LIFEPP_BALANCE_API_PATH)
app/api/solana/lifepp-balance/route.ts (production readonly balance route; fail-soft rpc_not_configured in production)
wrangler.workers.p3a.jsonc (doc-only: public placeholder marked keyless; SOLANA_RPC_URL secret documented; not added to vars)
scripts/release-lint.mjs (P3A-RPC invariant guard, incl. fail-soft check)
callSitesUnchanged: src/components/Gatekeeper.tsx (verifySolanaPocc still calls readLifePlusBalanceRaw(connection) — now auto-routed server-side in the browser)
knownNonBlocking: LifePaymentModule dry-run still builds a tx client-side against NEXT_PUBLIC_SOLANA_RPC_URL (public placeholder) to verify shape (getLatestBlockhash). It never sees the paid secret, never signs, never broadcasts; in live-readonly the transfer is structurally impossible. Rate-limiting only affects the best-effort dry-run shape check.

The /api/solana/lifepp-balance route is an open readonly LIFE++ balance oracle (no auth, pre-gate). It only reads the LIFE++ ATA for a supplied wallet. Per-IP rate limiting to protect paid RPC quota is a follow-up before wide exposure.

validation.note: Real exit codes captured. No tail-masking, no faked PASS.

blockers.detail: Operator must set the server-only secret before a real P3A run: `npx wrangler secret put SOLANA_RPC_URL --config wrangler.workers.p3a.jsonc` with a production RPC (Helius/Triton/QuickNode/Alchemy). Until then the production route fails soft with rpc_not_configured.

This shell has no Cloudflare/wrangler auth and intermittent outbound HTTPS via the sandbox proxy. Deploy is an explicit operator action from an authenticated host (opennextjs-cloudflare build/deploy with --config wrangler.workers.p3a.jsonc).

rollbackInstructions: No deploy occurred — nothing to roll back. Secret rotate/remove: `npx wrangler secret put|delete SOLANA_RPC_URL --config wrangler.workers.p3a.jsonc`. If a P3A worker is later deployed and needs teardown: `npx wrangler delete --name ahin-io-p3a` (separate worker; never touches root ahin-io or ahin.io).
nextPhase: P3A deploy (operator action, requires SOLANA_RPC_URL secret + Cloudflare auth) -> clean readonly observation. P3B (single foundation-wallet micro-transfer) remains BLOCKED and additionally requires allowlist + cap + kill-switch drill + OOB mint/treasury/ATA verification + explicit operator authorization.
